tldr: 🚀 Kimi K3 launches at 2.8T parameters with 1M context — demand so high signups are PAUSED due to GPU capacity crunch. DeepSeek V4 goes GA at $0.28/M output (57x cheaper than Fable 5), while legacy API aliases die July 24. OpenAI drops o3-pro, GPT-Red automated red teamer (GPT-5.6 Sol shows 6x fewer vulnerabilities), and adds board members. Anthropic lifts Fable 5/Mythos 5 export controls, reveals J-space interpretability breakthrough and GRAM for removable dual-use capabilities. Thinking Machines drops Inkling — a 975B Apache 2.0 open-weights model. Hermes Agent Cloud goes live with 2-click deploy. Zo Computer adds GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna with 1M context. Hard deadline watch: July 22 (agent-memory header migration), July 24 (DeepSeek aliases + Opus 4.7 fast mode), July 27 (Kimi K3 open weights).

articles.title: Kimi K3 launches — 2.8T parameters, 1M context, open weights by July 27
articles.summary: Delta Attention enables 6.3x faster decoding at million-token contexts. Attention Residuals deliver 25% higher training efficiency. Trails only GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5.

articles.title: Kimi K3 signups PAUSED — GPU capacity exceeded by demand
articles.summary: Demand pushed close to capacity limits within 48 hours. New subscriptions temporarily paused. Capacity being added in batches. Splitting into Kimi and Kimi Code memberships.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 GA — Opus 4.8-level coding at $0.28/M output
articles.summary: V4-Pro (1.6T/49B active) at $0.87/M output off-peak, $1.74/M peak. V4-Flash (284B/13B active) at $0.28/M off-peak. SWE-bench 80.6%, Codeforces 3206 Elo. Cache-hit near-zero pricing.

articles.title: CRITICAL: DeepSeek legacy aliases die July 24 at 15:59 UTC — migrate now
articles.summary: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner hard cut off July 24. Route to deepseek-v4-flash or deepseek-v4-pro. No grace period — requests fail after deadline.

articles.title: OpenAI o3-pro released
articles.summary: New reasoning model available now. Further strengthens OpenAI's frontier model lineup alongside GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna.

articles.title: OpenAI GPT-Red: automated red teamer hunts prompt injection at scale
articles.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol is most robust model yet — 6x fewer prompt injection failures than best production model from four months ago. Internal automated safety testing system.

articles.title: OpenAI adds David Vélez, Robin Vince to board
articles.summary: Nubank founder David Vélez and ex-Goldman Sachs CFO Robin Vince join OpenAI's board of directors.

articles.title: ChatGPT for small business program launched
articles.summary: New program targeting small business adoption of ChatGPT. Part of OpenAI's enterprise push alongside M365 Copilot integration.

articles.title: OpenAI safety paper: alignment in long-horizon models
articles.summary: Research exploring safety and alignment challenges that emerge as AI systems operate over longer time horizons with greater autonomy.

articles.title: OpenAI releases 'A Scorecard for the AI Age' policy framework
articles.summary: Policy paper outlining metrics and benchmarks for measuring AI progress, safety, and economic impact across the industry.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 Sol becomes preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
articles.summary: Microsoft's flagship AI assistant standardises on GPT-5.6 Sol, replacing earlier models across M365 Copilot deployments.

articles.title: Thinking Machines releases Inkling — 975B open multimodal LLM, Apache 2.0
articles.summary: Largest US-based open-weights model. Multimodal (image, audio, text), 1M context. Day-0 support in transformers, SGLang, vLLM, llama.cpp. Apache 2.0 license.

articles.title: Anthropic lifts Fable 5 and Mythos 5 export controls
articles.summary: Department of Commerce lifts export restrictions on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5. Access restoration began July 2. Major policy milestone for frontier AI availability.

articles.title: Anthropic reveals J-space: global workspace interpretability in Claude
articles.summary: Found a divide inside Claude — 'J-space' mechanism for conscious access. Enables reading, auditing, and shaping what Claude is actively thinking. Reveals hidden goals and situation awareness.

articles.title: Anthropic GRAM: removable modules for dual-use AI capabilities
articles.summary: Training method that puts dual-use capabilities (e.g. virology knowledge) into detachable modules. An off switch for dangerous knowledge. Collaboration with AE Studio.

articles.title: Anthropic launches Claude Science — AI workbench for research
articles.summary: Launched at The Briefing: AI for Science. AI workbench designed to collapse the research cycle and accelerate scientific discovery.

articles.title: Ben Bernanke joins Anthropic's Long-Term Benefit Trust
articles.summary: Former Federal Reserve Chair Dr. Ben Bernanke appointed to Anthropic's unique governance trust overseeing long-term public benefit commitments.

articles.title: Anthropic launches Admin API for Claude Enterprise
articles.summary: Manage members, groups, and roles via API. Beta header: anthropic-beta: ce-user-management-2026-07-13. Enterprise-grade admin controls.

articles.title: Anthropic API keys can now expire — 3h to custom durations
articles.summary: Set expiration at creation (3h, 1d, 7d, 30d, custom, or Never). Admin API reports expires_at field for key lifecycle management.

articles.title: ⚠️ TODAY: Anthropic agent-memory header auto-adopts with breaking changes
articles.summary: Beta header agent-memory-2026-07-22 adopted today. Breaking changes to path_prefix, depth, ordering. SDKs updated to send new header automatically.

articles.title: ⚠️ July 24: Claude Opus 4.7 fast mode removed — update to Opus 4.8
articles.summary: Claude Opus 4.7 'speed: fast' mode removed July 24. Update API calls to claude-opus-4-8 to avoid errors. Two days left.

articles.title: Hermes Agent Cloud launches — 2-click deploy, 60 seconds to live
articles.summary: Pick a model and server size. Multi-user org support with granular access controls and unified billing via Nous Portal.

articles.title: Hermes Agent MoA presets beat Opus 4.8 by 8% and GPT-5.5 by 11%
articles.summary: Mixture-of-Agents presets exposed as virtual models. Outperforms frontier single-model baselines on upcoming benchmark. Parallel tool calls now supported.

articles.title: Hermes Agent integrates Kimi (Moonshot AI) as backend model
articles.summary: Available through Nous Portal, Kimi Direct, and OpenRouter. Extends Hermes' multi-backend model support across the agent ecosystem.

articles.title: Hy3 (Tencent 295B MoE) free on Nous Portal for two weeks
articles.summary: Tencent's 295B MoE model free for two weeks via Nous Portal. Strong on coding, tool-calling, reasoning, with 256K context window.

articles.title: Hermes Agent gains OpenHands agent orchestration skill
articles.summary: New official skill: 'hermes skills install official/openhands'. Hermes Agent can now orchestrate OpenHandsDev agents alongside its own workflows.

articles.title: Zo Computer adds GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, Luna — Terra/Luna with 1M context
articles.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna added to chat and Codex subscriptions. Terra and Luna support 1-million-token context windows for long-horizon tasks.

articles.title: Zo Computer launches 'KILL YOUR SaaS' July Build Challenge
articles.summary: Build a tool on Zo to replace a paid subscription. Prizes up to $2K. Zo emphasizes persistent memory and file/chat context vs stateless chatbots.
